import openpyxl
from openpyxl import Workbook
from openpyxl.styles import Font, Alignment, Border, Side, PatternFill
from openpyxl.utils import get_column_letter

def build_template(ws):
    ws.title = "製造指図書"

    # Page setup
    ws.page_setup.paperSize = 9
    ws.page_setup.fitToPage = True
    ws.page_setup.fitToWidth = 1
    ws.page_setup.fitToHeight = 1
    ws.page_setup.orientation = "portrait"
    from openpyxl.worksheet.page import PageMargins
    ws.page_margins = PageMargins(left=0.5, right=0.5, top=0.5, bottom=0.5, header=0, footer=0)

    # Column widths (A=1 .. N=14)
    col_widths = {
        1: 4,   # A
        2: 8,   # B
        3: 10,  # C
        4: 8,   # D
        5: 6,   # E
        6: 6,   # F
        7: 8,   # G
        8: 8,   # H
        9: 10,  # I
        10: 10, # J
        11: 10, # K
        12: 10, # L
        13: 10, # M
        14: 8,  # N
    }
    for col, width in col_widths.items():
        ws.column_dimensions[get_column_letter(col)].width = width

    # Row heights
    row_heights = {
        1: 20,
        2: 20,
        3: 20,
        4: 20,
        5: 20,
        6: 20,
        7: 20,
        8: 20,
        9: 30,  # title row 調合票
        10: 20,
        11: 20,
        12: 20,
        13: 20,
        14: 20,
        15: 20,
        16: 20,
        17: 20,
        18: 20,
        19: 20,
        20: 20,
        21: 20,
        22: 20,
        23: 20,
        24: 20,
        25: 20,
        26: 20,
        27: 20,
        28: 20,
        29: 20,
        30: 20,
        31: 20,
        32: 40,  # 備考
        33: 20,
    }
    for row, height in row_heights.items():
        ws.row_dimensions[row].height = height

    thin = Side(style='thin')
    medium = Side(style='medium')
    thin_border = Border(left=thin, right=thin, top=thin, bottom=thin)

    # Apply thin border to all used cells
    for row in range(1, 34):
        for col in range(1, 15):
            cell = ws.cell(row=row, column=col)
            cell.border = thin_border

    # Fill color for header label cells
    grey_fill = PatternFill(fill_type="solid", fgColor="D9D9D9")

    center = Alignment(horizontal='center', vertical='center', wrap_text=True)
    left = Alignment(horizontal='left', vertical='center', wrap_text=True)
    bold = Font(bold=True, size=10)
    normal = Font(size=9)
    title_font = Font(bold=True, size=14)
    small = Font(size=8)

    # ---- ROW 1: 製造指図書 title ----
    ws.cell(row=1, column=1).value = "秘"
    ws.cell(row=1, column=1).font = Font(size=10, color="FF0000")
    ws.cell(row=1, column=1).alignment = center

    ws.cell(row=1, column=5).value = "製造指図書"
    ws.cell(row=1, column=5).font = title_font
    ws.cell(row=1, column=5).alignment = center

    # Barcode area label (right side)
    ws.cell(row=1, column=11).value = "（バーコード）"
    ws.cell(row=1, column=11).font = normal
    ws.cell(row=1, column=11).alignment = center

    # ---- ROW 2: 手配No. ----
    ws.cell(row=2, column=1).value = "手配No."
    ws.cell(row=2, column=1).font = bold
    ws.cell(row=2, column=1).alignment = center
    ws.cell(row=2, column=1).fill = grey_fill

    ws.cell(row=2, column=7).value = "発行日"
    ws.cell(row=2, column=7).font = bold
    ws.cell(row=2, column=7).alignment = center
    ws.cell(row=2, column=7).fill = grey_fill

    # ---- ROW 3: 手配先 ----
    ws.cell(row=3, column=1).value = "手配先"
    ws.cell(row=3, column=1).font = bold
    ws.cell(row=3, column=1).alignment = center
    ws.cell(row=3, column=1).fill = grey_fill

    ws.cell(row=3, column=9).value = "手配納期"
    ws.cell(row=3, column=9).font = bold
    ws.cell(row=3, column=9).alignment = center
    ws.cell(row=3, column=9).fill = grey_fill

    ws.cell(row=3, column=13).value = "作成者"
    ws.cell(row=3, column=13).font = bold
    ws.cell(row=3, column=13).alignment = center
    ws.cell(row=3, column=13).fill = grey_fill

    # ---- ROW 4: 品目CD ----
    ws.cell(row=4, column=1).value = "品目CD"
    ws.cell(row=4, column=1).font = bold
    ws.cell(row=4, column=1).alignment = center
    ws.cell(row=4, column=1).fill = grey_fill

    ws.cell(row=4, column=6).value = "工順"
    ws.cell(row=4, column=6).font = bold
    ws.cell(row=4, column=6).alignment = center
    ws.cell(row=4, column=6).fill = grey_fill

    ws.cell(row=4, column=9).value = "発注手配数"
    ws.cell(row=4, column=9).font = bold
    ws.cell(row=4, column=9).alignment = center
    ws.cell(row=4, column=9).fill = grey_fill

    # ---- ROW 5: 品目名 ----
    ws.cell(row=5, column=1).value = "品目名"
    ws.cell(row=5, column=1).font = bold
    ws.cell(row=5, column=1).alignment = center
    ws.cell(row=5, column=1).fill = grey_fill

    ws.cell(row=5, column=9).value = "製番"
    ws.cell(row=5, column=9).font = bold
    ws.cell(row=5, column=9).alignment = center
    ws.cell(row=5, column=9).fill = grey_fill

    # ---- ROW 6: 手配内容 ----
    ws.cell(row=6, column=1).value = "手配内容"
    ws.cell(row=6, column=1).font = bold
    ws.cell(row=6, column=1).alignment = center
    ws.cell(row=6, column=1).fill = grey_fill

    ws.cell(row=6, column=9).value = "完成入庫"
    ws.cell(row=6, column=9).font = bold
    ws.cell(row=6, column=9).alignment = center
    ws.cell(row=6, column=9).fill = grey_fill

    # ---- ROW 7: ロットNo. ----
    ws.cell(row=7, column=1).value = "ロットNo."
    ws.cell(row=7, column=1).font = bold
    ws.cell(row=7, column=1).alignment = center
    ws.cell(row=7, column=1).fill = grey_fill

    ws.cell(row=7, column=9).value = "完成日"
    ws.cell(row=7, column=9).font = bold
    ws.cell(row=7, column=9).alignment = center
    ws.cell(row=7, column=9).fill = grey_fill

    # ---- ROW 8: 調合票 title ----
    ws.cell(row=8, column=5).value = "調合票"
    ws.cell(row=8, column=5).font = title_font
    ws.cell(row=8, column=5).alignment = center

    ws.cell(row=8, column=13).value = "責任者"
    ws.cell(row=8, column=13).font = bold
    ws.cell(row=8, column=13).alignment = center
    ws.cell(row=8, column=13).fill = grey_fill

    # ---- ROW 9: 調合票 header row ----
    headers = {
        1: "成分名",
        5: "原単位",
        7: "分量",
        9: "秤量者",
        11: "原料ロット",
        13: "確認者",
    }
    for col, val in headers.items():
        cell = ws.cell(row=9, column=col)
        cell.value = val
        cell.font = bold
        cell.alignment = center
        cell.fill = grey_fill

    # ---- ROWS 10-30: ingredient rows (blank) ----
    # Ingredient rows: columns 1-4 (成分名), 5-6 (原単位), 7-8 (分量), 9-10 (秤量者), 11-12 (原料ロット), 13-14 (確認者)
    for row in range(10, 31):
        for col in [1, 5, 7, 9, 11, 13]:
            ws.cell(row=row, column=col).alignment = center

    # ---- ROW 31: 備考 ----
    ws.cell(row=31, column=1).value = "備考"
    ws.cell(row=31, column=1).font = bold
    ws.cell(row=31, column=1).alignment = center
    ws.cell(row=31, column=1).fill = grey_fill

    # ---- MERGES (LAST) ----
    # Row 1
    ws.merge_cells('E1:J1')   # 製造指図書 title
    ws.merge_cells('K1:N1')   # barcode area

    # Row 2: 手配No.
    ws.merge_cells('A2:B2')   # 手配No. label
    ws.merge_cells('C2:D2')   # 手配No. value
    ws.merge_cells('E2:F2')   # sub-number value
    ws.merge_cells('G2:H2')   # 発行日 label
    ws.merge_cells('I2:N2')   # 発行日 value

    # Row 3: 手配先
    ws.merge_cells('A3:B3')   # 手配先 label
    ws.merge_cells('C3:H3')   # 手配先 value
    ws.merge_cells('I3:J3')   # 手配納期 label
    ws.merge_cells('K3:L3')   # 手配納期 value
    ws.merge_cells('M3:N3')   # 作成者 (spans rows 3-4)

    # Row 4: 品目CD
    ws.merge_cells('A4:B4')   # 品目CD label
    ws.merge_cells('C4:E4')   # 品目CD value
    ws.merge_cells('F4:F4')   # 工順 label (single)
    ws.merge_cells('G4:H4')   # 工順 value
    ws.merge_cells('I4:J4')   # 発注手配数 label
    ws.merge_cells('K4:N4')   # 発注手配数 value

    # Row 5: 品目名
    ws.merge_cells('A5:B5')   # 品目名 label
    ws.merge_cells('C5:H5')   # 品目名 value
    ws.merge_cells('I5:J5')   # 製番 label
    ws.merge_cells('K5:N5')   # 製番 value

    # Row 6: 手配内容
    ws.merge_cells('A6:B6')   # 手配内容 label
    ws.merge_cells('C6:H6')   # 手配内容 value
    ws.merge_cells('I6:J6')   # 完成入庫 label
    ws.merge_cells('K6:N6')   # 完成入庫 value

    # Row 7: ロットNo.
    ws.merge_cells('A7:B7')   # ロットNo. label
    ws.merge_cells('C7:H7')   # ロットNo. value
    ws.merge_cells('I7:J7')   # 完成日 label
    ws.merge_cells('K7:N7')   # 完成日 value

    # Row 8: 調合票
    ws.merge_cells('A8:D8')
    ws.merge_cells('E8:L8')   # 調合票 title
    ws.merge_cells('M8:N8')   # 責任者

    # Row 9: header
    ws.merge_cells('A9:D9')   # 成分名
    ws.merge_cells('E9:F9')   # 原単位
    ws.merge_cells('G9:H9')   # 分量
    ws.merge_cells('I9:J9')   # 秤量者
    ws.merge_cells('K9:L9')   # 原料ロット
    ws.merge_cells('M9:N9')   # 確認者

    # Ingredient rows 10-30
    for row in range(10, 31):
        ws.merge_cells(f'A{row}:D{row}')
        ws.merge_cells(f'E{row}:F{row}')
        ws.merge_cells(f'G{row}:H{row}')
        ws.merge_cells(f'I{row}:J{row}')
        ws.merge_cells(f'K{row}:L{row}')
        ws.merge_cells(f'M{row}:N{row}')

    # 備考
    ws.merge_cells('A31:N33')

    return ws


if __name__ == "__main__":
    wb = Workbook()
    ws = wb.active
    build_template(ws)
    wb.save("製造指図書_template.xlsx")
    print("Saved.")
pages.html:

手配内容 完成入庫
ロットNo. 完成日
調合票 責任者
成分名 原単位 分量 秤量者 原料ロット 確認者
備考
